parentEpic.title: aigluetoolset Adoption Round
parentEpic.objective: Coordinate one narrow adoption round for aigluetoolset without widening beyond text block measurement, clamp, and height prediction.
successCriteria: aigluetoolset keeps a narrow core contract.
lsclaw adopts one narrow workflow/thread surface.
vpsagentweb adopts one narrow logs preview surface.
No repo widens into editor or interaction primitives.

frozenContract.problemStatement: Adopt a narrow headless text block toolkit across selected product surfaces without widening the initial contract.
interfaceConstraints: Public package scope remains measureBlock, clampBlock, and predictBlockHeight.
Each child edits only its own repo.
Cross-repo contract drift must be escalated to the parent session.
acceptanceCriteria: The shared package contract remains narrow and documented.
Each child records repo-local verification or blocker state.
The parent records final acceptance state and next narrow follow-up.
notes: Prefer Kimi for implementation and Codex for review/closeout.

task.repoGoal: Implement or refine the narrow public package contract only.
blockerPolicy: Stop if the work requires editor or interaction primitives.

task.repoGoal: Adopt one narrow workflow/thread surface using the frozen aigluetoolset contract.
blockerPolicy: Do not change aigluetoolset public API directly; escalate drift to the parent.

task.repoGoal: Adopt one narrow logs preview surface using the frozen aigluetoolset contract.
verification: repo-local web build or equivalent narrow check
blockerPolicy: Do not widen into generalized rich text rendering.
